title: Tighten pion GFF dispersive bounds with explicit positivity kernels
summary: Recast pion GFF constraints into an optimization problem with explicit positivity kernels and scan subtraction/normalization assumptions.

expected_artifacts.description: Step-by-step derivation of the bound and assumptions (NOT_FOR_CITATION).

verification_plan: Deterministic script reproduces baseline bound then shows tightening under new constraint; persist inputs/outputs/plots.
risks: Numerical instability; mitigate with toy checks.

title: Extend positivity bootstrap to nucleon GFFs (record only)
summary: Potential extension of positivity/bootstrap machinery to nucleon gravitational form factors. Out of scope for W6-01 (pion-only), but record for reuse.
scope_notes: Out-of-scope: nucleon (non-pion) target. Record only; do not execute in this campaign.
verification_plan: If promoted in a future campaign, start with single-channel dispersive setup and reproduce known nucleon constraints first.
risks: Scope violation for current campaign; must not execute.
